question: [File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/util/DomainUtils.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: timeStampInNanos()] Can an unprivileged external user submit a transaction with a crafted Timestamp whose getSeconds() value (e.g., 1568376750538L) causes Math.multiplyExact() to throw ArithmeticException, causing the importer to drop the transaction entirely and preventing it from being gossiped or persisted?
